idis.blurb: Icomply installs and services IDIS DirectIP CCTV across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West, from camera layout and NVR commissioning through to planned maintenance and reactive call-outs. Our engineers handle recording health checks, HDD swaps and network tuning so multi-site estates keep clear, compliant footage. Trade mounts, cabling and storage accessories for IDIS are available from our North West shop for landlords, FM teams and installers.

innerrange.blurb: Icomply is a North West partner for Innerrange (Inner Range) intruder and integrated security platforms, covering new installs, expansions and certified maintenance to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131. From Concept and Integriti-style controller work to PIR zoning and keypad replacements, we keep commercial alarms performing for FM teams and contractors. Trade sensors, expansions and panel spares ship from our Stockport-area trade shop across Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside.

intercall.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains Intercall nurse call systems for care homes, clinics and supported living across the North West, aligned with HTM 08-03 best practice. We commission call points, overdoor lights and staff indicators, then provide planned servicing, pear-lead replacements and certification-ready documentation. Trade call-point packs, batteries and panel spares for Intercall are stocked for landlords, care operators and contractors from Stockport to Manchester and beyond.

From Rapid and Xclusive-range work to flue checks, annual services and landlord certification, our engineers keep plant efficient and compliant. jsb-electrical.blurb: Icomply installs, tests and certifies JSB Electrical emergency lighting to BS 5266 for commercial and residential blocks across Stockport, Manchester and the North West. From bulkheads and exit signage to conversion modules and duration testing, we keep escape routes compliant and audit-ready. Trade LED emergency fittings, batteries and legends for JSB Electrical are stocked for electrical contractors, landlords and FM teams via our North West trade counter.

kantech.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Kantech access control for offices, multi-tenant buildings and industrial sites across the North West, including KT-series controllers, readers and door hardware integration. We handle commissioning, credential enrolment, planned servicing and door fault call-outs with clear certification handover. Trade readers, tokens and controller spares for Kantech are available from our Stockport trade shop for installers and facilities teams in Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire.

kentec.blurb: Icomply is an experienced North West installer and maintainer of Kentec fire alarm control equipment, covering addressable and conventional panels to BS 5839. We commission loops, programme cause-and-effect, carry out periodic servicing and issue certification for landlords, main contractors and FM providers. Trade panel service kits, batteries and engineer consumables for Kentec are available from our Stockport-area shop serving Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire and Merseyside.

kingspan-air.blurb: Icomply installs and services Kingspan Air AOV and smoke-control ventilation systems for residential towers, commercial cores and stair pressurisation schemes across the North West. Our teams handle actuator setup, control panel testing, interface with fire alarms and certification support to BS 9991 / EN 12101 guidance. Trade actuator spares, magnets and control consumables for Kingspan Air are available through our North West trade shop for contractors and building managers.
